label.purpose: Error codes and small technical captions.

shadows.name: mark-glow
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the single centered brand mark icon on empty-state / dead-end screens.

motion.name: rise-and-fade
motion.value: translateY(10px)->none, opacity 0->1, 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), ~60ms stagger per element
motion.purpose: Default entrance for empty-state screens. Fully visible without motion; only applies under prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action on empty-state and dead-end screens.
components.html: Back to docs home
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.875rem; padding-inline: 1.25rem; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; background: oklch(0.560 0.170 148); color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.44 0.145 150); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.560 0.170 148); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-arrow { transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-arrow { transform: translateX(-3px); }

components.name: Important Callout
components.description: Nextra callout re-mapped to the brand green; body copy stays ink so it always clears AA.
components.html:
!
Important: this behavior only applies on mainnet.
components.css: .ds-callout { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 3px; background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.560 0.170 148) 12%, #F2F6F3); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.560 0.170 148) 60%, transparent); color: oklch(0.180 0.013 150); } .ds-callout-icon { color: oklch(0.560 0.170 148); font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Centered mark + label + title + body + one action + secondary links. Canonical pattern for 404 and the coming-soon gate.
components.html:
●

Status

Coming soon

The docs aren't live yet. Check back soon, or follow along on Discord.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; gap: 0; max-width: 34rem; margin-inline: auto; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; } .ds-empty-mark { width: 64px; height: 64px; color: oklch(0.560 0.170 148); filter: drop-shadow(0 6px 20px color-mix(in oklab, #08AA18 35%, transparent)); } .ds-empty-label { margin-top: 1.5rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(0.420 0.018 150); } .ds-empty-title { margin-top: 0.5rem; font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 7vw, 2rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.15; color: oklch(0.180 0.013 150); } .ds-empty-desc { margin-top: 0.875rem; max-width: 30rem; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.420 0.018 150); }

narrative.overview: The docs are a near-monochrome technical surface — a light near-white or near-black neutral, tinted a whisper toward the brand's own green hue so it never reads as generic gray. Against that quiet field, exactly one color is allowed to mean something: Velocity Green. It marks the logo, the primary action, the active nav tab, and the "important" callout — the four places a reader needs a signal, not decoration. Everything else stays in ink and neutral so the green never competes with itself. This system explicitly rejects hype-driven marketing chrome: no gradients, no countdown timers, no glassmorphism, no oversized hero stats.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (Velocity Green) carries all signal; neutrals carry everything else.
Callouts use accent-as-border-and-icon, not accent-as-background-wash, so body text always clears AA.
Flat by default — the only shadow in the system is a soft green glow under the mark icon on empty-state screens.
Motion is a rise-and-fade on load, staggered by ~60ms per element, never more.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Velocity Green appears in exactly one semantic role per screen: the thing the reader should act on. It is never used decoratively.

rules.name: The Ink-Not-Wash Rule
rules.body: Callout body copy is always set in ink, never in the accent hue. The accent carries the border and the leading icon only.

rules.name: The No-Overflow Rule
rules.body: Any large clamp-scaled heading must be tested against its actual copy at the narrowest supported width; if it overflows, shrink the clamp max before rewriting the copy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Nothing gets a shadow just because it's a container. Shadows are earned by exactly one component role (the empty-state mark), never applied broadly for depth.

dos: Do keep Velocity Green to one semantic role per screen — the primary action or the one thing that matters.
Do set callout and empty-state body copy in ink, never in the accent hue.
Do reuse the empty-state pattern (mark → label → title → body → one action → secondary links) for the coming-soon gate.
Do gate every animation behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference, with a fully-visible default state.
donts: Don't use marketing-campaign styling — no gradients, no countdown timers, no hero stat rows, no email-capture forms.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient headlines; emphasis comes from weight and size only.
Don't apply glassmorphism or decorative blur; the system is flat by design.
Don't introduce a second accent color for "variety" — every non-green hue in this system is semantic (info/warn/danger) and callout-only.
Don't let large clamp-scaled titles overflow on narrow viewports; test the actual copy at the smallest supported width.
